description: Companion repository for motivation, reinforcement, learning, conditioning, feedback, reward systems, self-determination, gamification, and ethical learning environments.

articles.title: What Is Motivation?
articles.summary: A foundational article on the forces that initiate and sustain behavior.

articles.title: What Is Reinforcement?
articles.summary: Reinforcement as behavioral strengthening through consequence and context.

articles.title: Learning as Behavioral Adaptation
articles.summary: How organisms and people adjust behavior through experience.

articles.title: Behaviorism and the Study of Observable Action
articles.summary: Classic behaviorism and empirical approaches to action.

articles.title: From Conditioning to Cognitive Learning
articles.summary: The bridge between behaviorist learning and cognitive theory.

articles.title: Motivation, Environment, and Agency
articles.summary: How internal motives and external settings interact.

articles.title: Classical Conditioning
articles.summary: Learning through association and predictive cues.

articles.title: Operant Conditioning
articles.summary: Learning through consequences and behavioral selection.

articles.title: Reinforcement and Punishment
articles.summary: Strengthening and weakening behavior through consequences.

articles.title: Positive and Negative Reinforcement
articles.summary: How adding or removing stimuli can strengthen behavior.

articles.title: Extinction, Generalization, and Discrimination
articles.summary: How learned behavior changes across contexts.

articles.title: Schedules of Reinforcement
articles.summary: Fixed, variable, interval, and ratio schedules.

articles.title: Shaping, Chaining, and Behavioral Training
articles.summary: Building complex behaviors from simpler actions.

articles.title: Reward Systems and Behavioral Strengthening
articles.summary: How rewards affect behavior over time.

articles.title: Feedback Loops in Learning
articles.summary: Feedback as correction, reinforcement, and adaptation.

articles.title: Immediate vs Delayed Feedback
articles.summary: Timing and the strength of learning signals.

articles.title: Variable Rewards and Behavioral Capture
articles.summary: Unpredictable reward schedules, persistence, and platform risks.

articles.title: Intrinsic and Extrinsic Motivation
articles.summary: Internal and external drivers of action.

articles.title: Self-Determination Theory
articles.summary: Autonomy, competence, relatedness, and sustainable motivation.

articles.title: Autonomy, Competence, and Relatedness
articles.summary: Core needs in self-determination theory.

articles.title: Gamification and Behavioral Design
articles.summary: Points, feedback, incentives, motivation, and ethics.

responsible_use: Educational and research-scaffolding examples only; not operational guidance without validation and ethical review.
